name: ElevenLabs
data_egress_concerns: Voice samples uploaded for cloning may contain biometric data subject to privacy regulation (BIPA, GDPR)
Text scripts sent for synthesis may contain confidential communications, internal memos, or PII
Cloned voice profiles could be misused for social engineering if access is not controlled
Audio outputs may reproduce sensitive meeting content or privileged legal discussions
training_use_default: Free-tier voice data and generated audio may be used for model improvement. Enterprise plans offer contractual training exclusion and custom voice isolation. Review current ElevenLabs terms.
